caption: A sequence of frames shows people arriving at an airport, with on-screen text reading "GRANADA AIRPORT" and "12:08". A large dark blue bus featuring a prominent white Real Madrid logo and various sponsors is parked on a paved area next to a beige building. Several men are visible, including one in a grey polo shirt and black pants walking away from the bus, and another wearing a white t-shirt, black pants, and a dark face mask who steps off the bus. In the background, other individuals stand near red barriers. As the sequence progresses, the man in the white t-shirt continues to move away from the bus, while the man in the grey polo continues walking forward. The scene remains brightly lit under a clear sky, focusing on the movement of the individuals around the branded team bus.
